Cross-platform CI validation scripts that enforce repository governance rules before merge.
validate-legacy.js: Node.js validator for legacy debt rows, stub register consistency, stub marker governance and .desc.json parsing.
validate-legacy.ps1: PowerShell wrapper that delegates legacy/stub validation to the cross-platform Node.js validator.
validate-manifest-authoring.js: Node.js validator for ADR-030 authoring manifest compilation, generated drift and authoring-only key leakage.
